children.label: Review
children.name: review
children.default: The repair was done quickly without cutting corners, and the quality of the work really shows.

default.title: Roof Replacement
default.review: J.A Edwards of America did an excellent job on our roof. From the first inspection to the final work, the team was responsive, respectful, and very professional.

default.title: Professional Repair
default.review: The repair was done quickly without cutting corners, and the quality of the work really shows. Brandon's customer service was truly outstanding and made the process stress-free.

default.title: Insurance Claim Help
default.review: Getting a roof through insurance can be a headache, but the team was super knowledgeable and made the whole process seamless for us. They were helpful and transparent throughout.
